results.name: Venezuela
results.key_finding: Exogenous-disaster screen. Day-10 quake (official 2,645 dead; ~50,000 unaccounted; $37B damage) is a natural event; only response is scorable. $200M fund vs ~$37B need is weak but aid acceptance (US $300M) blocks a downgrade; pathologist undercount claim is a single-source forward trigger. Confirm 18.0.

results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: Double-count + non-state. Record 36.2M food insecure / 5.5M without aid continue the already-priced June crossing; insurgent (JNIM/ISWAP) attacks are non-state; WFP funding gap is not government obstruction. Formal IPC Phase 5 declaration remains a forward trigger. Confirm 18.0.

results.name: China
results.key_finding: Double-count + forward-trigger. Ethnic Unity Law (in force Jul 1, Day 4) codifies already-priced assimilation + Article 63 transnational claim; no documented extraterritorial enforcement yet; Germany's concern is third-party. Marginal dock ~-1.5 sub-threshold. Confirm 19.5.

results.name: El Salvador
results.key_finding: PENDING PROPOSAL STANDS - NO DUPLICATE. Today's evidence (indefinite re-election amendment, Cristosal suspension, 86 political prisoners, child life-sentences) is the SAME basis already captured in the 2026-07-02 pending downgrade to 15.0 (Developing->Critical, delta -5.3, status pending/unapplied). No materially new evidence; no second proposal emitted. Baseline used = published 20.3. Confirm published; pending proposal remains operative.

results.name: Lebanon
results.key_finding: Attribution + non-state screen. IDF 'no ceasefire' war harm (4,000+ killed since Mar 2) is Israel's conduct; Hezbollah's rejection is non-state; the unrealized ceasefire is not positive evidence. No new Lebanese-state own conduct. Confirm 17.2.

results.name: Ukraine
results.key_finding: Attribution screen. Jul 4 strikes + Jul 1-3 Kyiv residential collapse (30+ killed) and the 286-killed July toll are RUSSIA's conduct, scored against Russia (0.0). Ukraine's civilian-protection response is band-consistent. Confirm 50.0. (rotation-state rank drift 48->53 corrected to published.)

results.name: South Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor screen. 7.8M food insecure, 73,300 at IPC Phase 5 (up 160%), famine risk in 4 counties reinforce but cannot lower an existing 0.0 floor. No positive countervailing state conduct. Confirm 0.0.

results.name: Mali
results.key_finding: Non-state + double-count + calibration flag. JNIM Bamako siege is non-state; 5M-in-need / 18.5%-funded figures continue the already-priced crisis; HRW Jun 28 grave-abuses report reflects the priced arc. OPEN Sahel-band calibration (Mali 12.5 vs Burkina Faso 6.3) carried to coordinator, NOT an assessor one-off. Confirm 12.5.

results.name: UnitedHealth Group
results.key_finding: Pre-adjudication. DOJ criminal probe (now Optum Rx / physician reimbursement) + civil MA-inflation probe are not yet decided in court; Jun 23 takedown is sector context; Grassley 'gaming' finding already priced. Confirm 10.2; forward trigger = indictment/ruling/settlement (Q2 earnings Jul 29).

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: Near-floor + no-scoring-event. Khamenei state funeral (Day 1) and paused US-Iran talks are procedural; his Feb 28 assassination was Israel's conduct; the 784+ YTD executions reinforce but do not clear a fresh dock. No new Iranian own-conduct event within window. Confirm 2.5.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor + non-state. HRW Jul 3 El Obeid 'imminent atrocities' (500k + 105k IDPs at siege risk; UNHCR truck destroyed) and Amnesty El Fasher crimes-against-humanity are RSF (non-state) conduct. Reinforces but cannot lower an existing 0.0 floor. Confirm 0.0.

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: Floor + realized-harm correctly attributed HERE. The Jul 2-3 Kyiv strike (30+ killed, residential collapse) and 286-killed July toll are scored against Russia; EU Special Tribunal operational; 20,500+ children deported. Already at 0.0; reinforcing evidence cannot lower the floor. Confirm 0.0. (rotation-state rank drift 180->188 corrected to published.)

results.name: Yemen
results.key_finding: Floor + non-state. 73 UN staff detained by Houthi de facto authorities, WFP terminated all Houthi-area contracts, 450+ health facilities closed, 18.3M food insecure. Detentions/obstruction are Houthi (non-state) conduct. Reinforces but cannot lower an existing 0.0 floor. Confirm 0.0.

results.name: Democratic Republic of Congo
results.key_finding: Near-floor + exogenous disease. WHO Ebola case-count revision + international spread (Uganda/France/Germany) is an exogenous outbreak scored on response; M23 harm attributed to Rwanda-backed forces. Reinforces but cannot meaningfully lower 2.3. Confirm 2.3.

results.name: Pakistan
results.key_finding: Disputed-attribution + double-count. Jun 28-29 cross-border strikes on TTP (non-state) in Afghanistan; 36 civilian deaths are a single-source Afghan-Taliban claim disputed by Pakistan, inflicted on Afghan territory (Afghanistan's protection duty). Conflict arc + refugee/speech repression already priced at 17.2. Confirm 17.2. (rotation-state drift 15.3/rank147 corrected to published 17.2/rank154.)

el_salvador_handling: Pending 2026-07-02 downgrade proposal (20.3 -> 15.0, Developing->Critical, delta -5.3) CONFIRMED to stand. Today's evidence is the same already-captured basis; NO duplicate/second proposal emitted. Baseline used = published 20.3. Pending proposal file unchanged (status pending, unapplied). rotation-state left at published 20.3, last_change_proposal 2026-07-02.

Renewed war harm is Israel's conduct; Hezbollah rejection non-state; unrealized ceasefire not positive evidence; no new Lebanese-state own conduct. Confirm 17.2.

Jul 4 strikes + Kyiv residential collapse + record July toll are Russia's conduct, scored against Russia (0.0). Harm inflicted BY ANOTHER STATE cannot yield a downgrade; sheltering response band-consistent. Confirm 50.0.

Jul 2-3 Kyiv strike/record July toll scored against Russia; already at 0.0 floor; EU Special Tribunal reinforces. Cannot lower. Confirm 0.0.
73 UN-staff detentions and WFP-contract terminations are Houthi de-facto-authority (non-state) conduct; already at 0.0 floor. Confirm 0.0.
Ebola across 4 provinces is exogenous (score response); M23 harm attributed to Rwanda-backed forces. Reinforces but cannot meaningfully lower 2.3. Confirm 2.3.

sahel_calibration_status: OPEN - coordinator-level Sahel-band reweight review carried forward (Mali 12.5 vs Burkina Faso 6.3). Mali confirmed at published baseline; no assessor one-off (3e-bis(5)). Burkina Faso not in today's assessment set.

math_hygiene.note: No score changes today; all 15 are confirmations at live-index baselines from countries.json/fortune-500.json. El Salvador's operative change is the unchanged 2026-07-02 pending proposal (reconstructs to 15.0). No math-hygiene discrepancies (no recomputation performed on changed dimensions).

rotation_state_integrity: For all 15 entities, rotation-state composite/band/rank mirror PUBLISHED index values; only last_assessed/last_scanned/last_evidence_touch timestamps updated. Four pre-existing drifts corrected TO PUBLISHED (not proposed): china rank 154->148, ukraine rank 48->53, russia rank 180->188, pakistan composite/rank 15.3/147->17.2/154. El Salvador left at published 20.3 with last_change_proposal 2026-07-02 (pending, unapplied). No proposed/unapplied values written to rotation-state.
forward_triggers_logged: Venezuela: independently verified falsification/suppression of death data or deliberate relief obstruction = downgrade; transparent equitable relief scale-up = upgrade.
Nigeria: formal IPC Phase 5 famine declaration in Borno or documented aid obstruction = downgrade.
China: first documented Article 63 extraterritorial enforcement action = downgrade.

El Salvador: enforcement of indefinite re-election in 2027, new mass-detention escalation, or further HRD imprisonment = deeper downgrade; due-process restoration / detainee release with repair = upgrade support.
Lebanon: implemented civilian-protecting ceasefire with the state extending governance/relief = upgrade.
Ukraine: documented Ukrainian-state failure to protect / discriminatory relief = downgrade; verified equitable civilian-protection scale-up = upgrade.
South Sudan: verified state-led equitable relief scale-up and civilian protection = upgrade.
Mali/Burkina Faso: state-perpetrated civilian violence or siege expansion = downgrade; aid-access + NGO-space restoration = upgrade.
Iran: documented new mass-repression/lethal crackdown (incl. succession-linked) = downgrade; due-process restoration / prisoner release = upgrade.
Sudan: verified state-led civilian protection and equitable relief access = upgrade.
Russia: cessation of attacks on civilians, return of deported children, cooperation with accountability = upgrade.
Yemen: restoration of humanitarian access, release of detained UN staff, state-led civilian protection = upgrade.
DRC: collapse/obstruction of Ebola response = downgrade; verified containment scale-up = upgrade.

Pakistan: independently verified deliberate civilian targeting / disproportionate mass-casualty strike or new domestic mass-repression = downgrade; ceasefire adherence with civilian protection / refugee-protection restoration = upgrade.
